name: CrateSkipper
description: Hold a hotkey (keyboard + controller) on the end-of-wave crate screen to auto-discard every offered crate for gold and skip straight through the selection.

keyboard_scancode.title: Keyboard Hotkey (Godot scancode)
keyboard_scancode.description: Godot KEY_* scancode for the skip-crates hotkey. Default 71 = G (bundled icon).

joypad_button_index.title: Controller Hotkey (joypad button index)
joypad_button_index.description: Joypad button index. Default 10 = Back (Xbox) / Share (PS) / - (Switch) — bundled icons, no conflict with existing crate-screen actions.
